column2: # Compute participant-level aggregates for rt and accuracy
participant_rt_acc <- test_targets %>% group_by(participant) %>% summarise(rt = mean(rt, na.rm=TRUE), accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm=TRUE))
# Merge with existing metrics and select core numeric columns for correlation
corr_df <- metrics %>% distinct(participant, overall_REC, overall_LDI) %>% inner_join(participant_rt_acc, by = "participant") %>% select(overall_REC, overall_LDI, rt, accuracy) %>% drop_na()
